'''Ambrostine''' was an [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] beverage. Over-consumption was known to cause loss of inhibitions, followed by [[Sleep/Legends|sleepiness]], these symptoms noted particularly in a way indicative of greater effect than the standard effects of alcohol.<ref name="Allegiance" /> It was popular among [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] dignitaries.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|26|Ambrostine}}</ref>

{{Food-stub}}
